Hi Ian/JH,

Please find attached

   1. v3 of the Business Update deck attached, incorporating Ian's comments
   from discussion on Friday
   2. v1 of the BAU CB Monthly Update deck

Please let me know for any feedback.

Key changes Business Update deck as below:
1) CN Seller Universe Projection

   - Slide 4: Updated for Choice UE numbers after alignment with Choice team
   - Slide 4: More aggressive growth of UE for FBS to reach end state
   - Slide 5: Updated for total profitability in absolute numbers (PC2 +
   SLS + Standalone)

2) LFF Assessment

   - Slide 17: Updated ST assessment of market
   - Slide 19: Updated cost assessment using CPI and with projected WH CPI
   aligned with local markets, we now expect to be better or on par in SG/MY,
   and small gap in PH, while gap is bigger in TH
   - Slide 20: Changed overall conduciveness assessment
   - Slide 22: Split view of NN and Local WH
   - Slide 23: Added projection assumptions more clearly
   - Slide 24: Changed commission rate assumptions to be clearer
   - Slide 28: Call out differences between 3PF and FBS UE, NNWH UE gap

3) Counter TB

   - Slide 47-55: Added SOB target by acquisition/sourcing levers

content.answer: $0.38 (From TH FinOps and what we are currently using)

$0.0221 (From Reg WH)

We shall propose to use $0.0221 version until we are able to under the
detailed cost allocation logic to CB


Slide 26

   -

   TH NN WH still feels very bad compared to SLS, what is the reason so? Is
   it because we also give SLS discounts for being in NN? Which eats into
   profits?

Yes, NN WH takes a 29% SLS discount on SLS



Slide 31

   -

   Have to probably look at SLS rates too, I remember there was some
   discount as well

Will include end rate after considering SLS rates discount


Slide 33

   -

   How about NNWH for TH? There should be proposed next steps?
   -

   And how about NNWH for VN?

Will include final proposal into this structure, in high level we will
propose the below

TH NNWH - Continue using but placed lower priority vs Local WH, we can
   consider increasing commission rate to benchmark SLS

VN NNWH - Continue using as there are sellers who can’t do 3PF in VN,
   but we can consider increasing commission rate to benchmark SLS



   -

   I thought we were working with another ERP as well?

serving CN market

Due to 旺店通’s close partnership with BABA and its compliance-oriented
approach, it is also cautious about onboarding Taobao SKUs but shows
commitment PDD-SHP seller &SKU migration.

Currently, both sides are developing products for PDD ERP system
integration, with joint testing among SHP, ERP and pilot sellers expected
by end-May



   -

   What kind of management level agreement are we going for?

relationship with Taobao, resulting in limited commitment to SHP

We propose that management reinforce SHP’s willingness to collaborate
during Wed’s Roundtable to strengthen 聚水潭’s commitment and unlock the
seller inbound channel, which would significantly boost counter TB orders
and ADG (~40%+ of the total ADG increment in 2025)
